documentation_files.description: Executive summary, 8 envelope dimensions, 10 design questions, 10 success conditions, key findings
Overlay count scaling, coexistence quadratic growth, domain/entry/cluster saturation, saturation governance rules
Replay chain depth scaling, determinism guarantee, clarity thresholds, dependency-driven complexity, failure scenarios
Rollback chain scaling, cascade complexity, selective revocation, S-state regression risk, determinism guarantee
Orchestration depth tolerance, re-evaluation queue ceiling, governance decision density, depth interaction effects
Per-dimension degradation thresholds for 7 observability dimensions, compound degradation, collapse definition
8 primary + 4 compound overload indicators, detection algorithm, response protocol, BlueEdge scenarios
12 entropy indicators (5 structural, 5 behavioral, 2 governance), resistance mechanisms, monitoring protocol
4-zone model (SAFE/PRESSURE/RISK/PROHIBITED), entry/exit criteria, zone-specific governance rules
5-level recovery mechanism hierarchy, recovery cost/time models, decision algorithm, recovery verification
5 escalation levels (G-0 through G-4), triggers, response protocols, de-escalation, BlueEdge profile
Pre-flight, scope, 12 execution steps, 15 artifacts, governance
Stream closure with governance stability envelope verdict

governance_notes: Governance-boundary exploration only. No sandbox artifacts created. No certified baseline artifacts modified. All analysis source-derived from upstream specifications. 8 pressure dimensions characterized, 4 governance zones defined, 12 entropy indicators formalized, 5 escalation levels established.
